description_long: This hardware store occupies a three-story building with a steeply pitched, shingled roof featuring six dormer windows and two red chimneys. The facade is adorned with large display windows and double glass doors at street level, above which the words 'GEBRÜDER HAMBURG' are inscribed in gold lettering. The upper floors have regularly spaced rectangular windows with decorative lintels and subtle classical detailing along the cornice. The side and rear walls are plain and unadorned, painted in a light neutral color, with no windows or architectural embellishments. The roof is covered in small, dark gray shingles, and a thin red trim runs along the roofline, adding a touch of color. The overall structure is solid and imposing, typical of older European urban commercial buildings.
description: A three-story hardware store with a classical facade, large display windows, and a steep shingled roof with dormer windows and red chimneys.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate facade, large display windows, double doors, and gold 'GEBRÜDER HAMBURG' signage.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the steep roof, dormer windows, and the plain, windowless side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned, light-colored back wall and the full expanse of the shingled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side wall and the roof's shape, with minimal architectural features.
attribute_storefront_signage: Gold lettering reading 'GEBRÜDER HAMBURG' is centered above the display windows on the facade, in a classic serif font.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features three large display windows and two glass double doors at street level, with the signage above. The upper floors have evenly spaced windows and subtle decorative elements.
